channel.title: annotations on YoSQL - write more SQL
channel.description: Recent content in annotations on YoSQL - write more SQL

item.title: annotateClasses
item.description: Controls whether @Generated annotations be added to generated classes. Defaults to false. Configuration Options Option: ‘false’ The default value of the annotateClasses configuration option is false. Setting the option to false therefore produces the same code generated as the default configuration. package com.example.persistence; public class SomeRepository { // ... rest of generated code } Option: ‘true’ Changing the annotateClasses configuration option to true adds the @Generated annotation to every generated class.

item.title: Annotations
item.description: The annotations configuration can be used to control how YoSQL outputs annotations. Tooling Maven In order to use YoSQL together with Maven, take a look at the tooling documentation for Maven. <build> <plugins> ... <plugin> <groupId>wtf.metio.yosql</groupId> <artifactId>yosql-maven-plugin</artifactId> <configuration> <annotations> <configOption>configValue</configOption> </annotations> </configuration> </plugin> ... </plugins> </build> Gradle In order to use YoSQL together with Gradle, take a look at the tooling documentation for Gradle. plugins { id("wtf.metio.yosql") } yosql { annotations { configOption = configValue } } Bazel In order to use YoSQL together with Bazel, take a look at the tooling documentation for Bazel.
